title: Sarge (clone commando)
content:
{{Top|ffa|leg}} {{Youmay|the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]]|[[Sarge (disambiguation)|another person named Sarge]]}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:Sarge-Orders.jpg]] |name=Sarge
RC-1013 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]]{{CWACite|4|Orders (comic story)}} |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin=Tan |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]{{CWACite|3|The Package (comic story)}} **[[Sarge's clone commando squad (Ord Mantell)|Unidentified squad]] **[[Aiwha Squad]] *[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]{{InsiderCite|87|Order 66: Destroy All Jedi}} |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|The Jedi were traitors to the Republic. We followed our orders. And we don't question orders…|RC-1013|}} '''Sarge''', also identified by the number '''RC-1013''', was a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[Clone Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] who served in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], he survived the war's [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|initiation]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]. During the war, he and the other three members of [[Sarge's clone commando squad (Ord Mantell)|his squad]] and a [[Unidentified clone commando squad (Ord Mantell)|second commando squad]] undertook a [[Mission to Ord Mantell (Clone Wars)|mission]] to [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] in order to retrieve a [[The Package|stolen diplomatic package]] intended for [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] from [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomats]] on the planet [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]]. Sarge managed to successfully retrieve the package from a group of [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]], although all other members of the two [[Commando/Legends|commando]] [[Squad/Legends|units]] were [[Death/Legends|eliminated]] in the process. He eventually joined [[Aiwha Squad]], a squad of [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] commandos consisting of [[Zag]], [[Tyto]], and [[Di'kut]]. He and his comrades were placed under [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Traavis]]' command and served under the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] during the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|sieges]] of Separatist-controlled worlds in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. During a [[Battle of Garqi (Clone Wars)|campaign]] on the planet [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]], Sarge and the rest of Aiwha Squad escorted a young orphan [[Youngling/Legends|boy]] named [[Evan]] to a [[Garqi refugee camp|refugee camp]] on Garqi. After reporting to Traavis, Sarge received a [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|command]] from Chancellor Palpatine to execute [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], which labeled all [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] as traitors to the Republic. Sarge immediately ordered the rest of Aiwha Squad to turn against Traavis, promptly executing the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. ==Biography== ===Early life and training=== {{Quote|We've got no homes, no mothers to raise us… No fathers to guide us… But we were thrown into a war and trained to die for a Republic we'd never even seen.|Sarge, to Evan|}} Unit RC-1013, who took on the name Sarge, was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] on the [[Water/Legends|water]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]. RC-1013 was [[Cloning/Legends|cloned]] from the [[Clone template/Legends|template]] of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] and received training as a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]], earning the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Clone Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]]. He served in the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|opening battle]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] on the planet [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], in which the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Ground warfare/Legends|fought]] the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Droid Army]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].{{Film|II}} During the fighting, Sarge was the only [[Clone trooper/Legends|trooper]] in his [[Squad/Legends|squad]] to survive the battle. He, along with all other [[Commando/Legends|commando]] units, joined the ranks of the [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]], a [[Special forces/Legends|special forces]] unit within the Grand [[Army/Legends|Army]] made up of clone commandos and [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commandos]].''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' The [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] was eventually given control over his [[Sarge's clone commando squad (Ord Mantell)|own squad]] of clone commandos. ===The Package=== {{Quote|That was for my squad.|Sarge, after killing a Trandoshan bounty hunter attempting to flee with the diplomatic package|}} [[File:Sarge.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Sarge takes vengeance for his squad's deaths.]] Six [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after Geonosis, Sarge and his unit were tasked by an [[Unidentified Advanced Recon Commando (intelligence officer)|ARC intelligence officer]] with a [[Mission to Ord Mantell (Clone Wars)|mission]] to [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] in order to retrieve a [[The Package|stolen diplomatic package]], which some [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomats]] from [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] had gifted to [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. Sarge and his team worked in conjunction with a [[Unidentified clone commando squad (Ord Mantell)|squad of blue-armored commandos]] in an attempt to secure the stolen gift from the [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] who had taken it. Sarge's team secured a position on top of one of the buildings in the [[Unidentified city (Ord Mantell)|city]] where the mercenaries were located, while the other squad set a street-level trap for the bounty hunters. When the package was spotted in the Trandoshans' second [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]], the squad on the ground attempted to capture the package, but was quickly [[Death/Legends|dispatched]], leading to the escape of the landspeeder with the diplomatic gift. Sarge and his squad pursued the mercenaries' speeder into the industrial yards of the [[City/Legends|city]]. Upon entering one of the buildings, the commandos eliminated a team of [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droids]], losing one of their comrades in the process. Sarge and the remaining two commandos fought until they had secured the room, which resulted in the death of another team member. The remaining Trandoshan who had the diplomatic gift surprised Sarge by shooting and killing the [[Unidentified clone commando sniper|only other member]] of the Sergeant's squad. Sarge promptly hurled himself at the mercenary and overpowered him, killing him with his [[Gauntlet vibroblade/Legends|knuckle plate vibro blade]] and successfully securing the package. He delivered the package to his superiors, who in turn gave the package to Palpatine and his [[Advisor/Legends|advisor]], [[Vice Chair/Legends|Vice Chair]] [[Mas Amedda/Legends|Mas Amedda]]. ===Further missions and Order 66=== {{Quote|Commandos! ''Execute Order 66!''|Sarge, to Aiwha Squad|}} Sarge participated in a [[Battle of the Celestial Wake|space battle]] in the [[Celestial Wake/Legends|Celestial Wake]], located in the [[Kriz sector/Legends|Kriz sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} He survived the [[Space warfare/Legends|skirmish]] and was eventually assigned to lead [[Aiwha Squad]], a commando unit consisting of himself, [[Zag]], [[Tyto]], and [[Di'kut]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Sarge and his squad were placed under the command of [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Traavis]]. Under the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master's]] leadership, they helped to [[Battle of Garqi (Clone Wars)|liberate]] the world of [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]] from the Separatists. After the battle, Sarge and Aiwha Squad were instructed by Traavis to search for civilians and escort them to a [[Garqi refugee camp|local refugee camp]]. [[File:Aiwha_66.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Sarge commands Aiwha Squad to execute Jedi General Traavis.]] During Aiwha Squad's search, Sarge and his unit came across a [[Youngling/Legends|young boy]] named [[Evan]], whose parents had been killed when the Republic forces bombed their house in an attempt to destroy all the [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]]. The Sergeant instructed the boy to travel back with them to the refugee camp, which was twenty [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] away from their location. During the trek, Evan managed to flee from the squad, but was ambushed by a [[OG-9 homing spider droid/Legends|OG-9 homing spider droid]]. As the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was threatening Evan, Sarge drew the spider droid's attention away from the boy, ambushing the droid with his squad and destroying it. The Sergeant checked on Evan's condition and made the decision to seek a campsite for the night. As he and his comrades were around the campfire with Evan, he introduced the other members of the squad and explained their role as clone [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]]. The next morning, Sarge and his unit made their way to the refugee camp with Evan and reported on their success to Traavis, who congratulated them and informed them that [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], the [[Supreme Commander of the Droid Armies/Legends|Supreme Commander of the Droid Armies]], had been recently [[Battle of Utapau/Legends|slain]]. Sarge then spoke with Evan, instructing him to be careful and always obey his superiors. After the conversation, Sarge received [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] from Supreme Chancellor Palpatine, which [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|commanded]] clone [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] to eliminate the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] as enemies of the Republic. Sarge immediately ordered Aiwha Squad to carry out the order, and they turned their weapons against Traavis, killing the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. Sarge explained to Evan, who witnessed Traavis' execution, that the Jedi were now enemies of the Republic, reiterating his beliefs in obeying the orders given to him. Sometime after that, Sarge filed the details of Traavis' execution in a report shortly after Palpatine [[Declaration of a New Order|declared]] himself [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] of the first [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].{{Film|III}} The official records, which were modified by [[Imperial Advisor/Legends|Imperial Advisor]] [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]] from a [[Casualty Report: Order 66|compilation of various reports]] created by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Marcellin Wessel]], stated that Traavis was killed in the act of stealing children in order to indoctrinate them in the Jedi ways. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|We've got nothing… but each other… and our orders.|Sarge, to Evan, regarding himself and Aiwha Squad|}} As a clone of Jango Fett, Sarge had tan skin, a [[Color/Legends|brown]] patch of [[Hair/Legends|hair]] on his head, and brown [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. He stood at 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall. He was diligent in obeying the commands of his superiors and did not question their orders, regardless of his personal feelings. Sarge's commitment to the soldiers under his command was such that he viewed his fellow clones as his brothers. During the mission to Ord Mantell, he executed the last Trandoshan mercenary out of vengeance for his perished squadmates. When he and Aiwha Squad were escorting Evan to the refugee camp on Garqi, the Sergeant at times became frustrated with the boy due to his stubborn refusal to submit to the squad's assistance, but later explained his background to the boy and offered him advice to survive in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. When Order 66 was issued, Sarge obeyed the command without hesitation, and made it a point to explain to Evan why his squad had executed Traavis. ==Equipment== During the Clone Wars' opening battle on Geonosis, Sarge was equipped with a set of [[Phase I clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase I clone trooper armor]]. Throughout the rest of the war, he wore a set of [[Katarn-class commando armor/Legends|Katarn-class commando armor]] that was partially painted in red. The Sergeant used a [[DC-17m Interchangeable Weapon System/Legends|DC-17m Interchangeable Weapon System]] during his missions, and he was also equipped with knuckle plate vibro blades. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|The brave sergeant from Clone Wars Adventures Vol. 3 is a reference to my birthday.|Ryan Kaufman, on RC-1013's designation|}} RC-1013 was created by [[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]] for the short story [[The Package (comic story)|''The Package'']], which was featured in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 3|third volume]] of the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'']] [[Star Wars comic books|trade paperbacks]]. He also appeared in [[Orders (comic story)|''Orders'']], a short story featured in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 4|fourth volume]] of the ''Clone Wars Adventures'' series that was also written by Kaufman. RC-1013's designation and nickname were first established in ''Orders'', and Kaufman stated on his official [[StarWars.com]] [[Star Wars: Blogs|blog]] that the character's designation was a reference to his birthday.{{Blog|RyanKaufman|8|What's In a Name?}} The character was drawn by [[Matthew Fillbach|Matthew]] and [[Shawn Fillbach]] for ''The Package'', and was penciled by [[Rick Lacy]] in ''Orders''. ==Appearances== *{{CWACite|3|The Package (comic story)}} {{1st}} *{{CWACite|4|Orders (comic story)}} {{1stID|Sarge}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|87|Order 66: Destroy All Jedi}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=RC-1013#legends |es=RC-1013 |id=RC-1013 |nl=RC-1013 |pl=RC-1013 }} [[Category:Clone commandos]] [[Category:Clone stormtroopers]] [[Category:Clone trooper sergeants]] [[Category:Males]]
